personalPreferences.title: Personal Preferences
personalPreferences.daySplitTimeHelp: Set the time used to split the day into two halves for the timetable view.
personalPreferences.startOfWeekHelp: Choose which day the week starts on.
personalPreferences.defaultPlanViewHelp: Choose the default view for the Program/Plan page.
personalPreferences.cardCompactnessHelp: Adjust the compactness of task cards.
personalPreferences.preferredWorkingDaysHelp: Select the days you typically work.

personalLocation.title: Personal Location Settings
personalLocation.help: Override workspace defaults with your specific location settings.

personalTemplates.title: My Personal Templates
personalTemplates.help: Your personal templates, complementing the workspace templates. Available only to you.

workspace.taskTemplatesHelp: Templates scaffold common workflows as a parent task with predefined children. Any team member can create workspace templates.

metricsGoals.title: Metrics Goals
metricsGoals.weeksComputationHelp: Number of weeks to compute metrics (default: 4 weeks)
metricsGoals.highImpactTaskGoalHelp: Target high impact tasks per EFT (default: 3.63)
metricsGoals.newCapabilitiesGoalHelp: Target time spent on new capabilities (default: 57.98%)

timeHours.title: Time & Hours
timeHours.hourlyBalanceUpperHelp: Multiplier for upper hourly balance limit (default: 0.5)
timeHours.hourlyBalanceLowerHelp: Multiplier for lower hourly balance limit (default: -0.5)
timeHours.cardAgingBaseDaysHelp: Days before cards show aging effects. Set to 0 to disable. (default: 30). Use decimals like 0.005 for testing (~7 min).
timeHours.wipLimitPerUserHelp: Maximum tasks in WIP per user. Set to 0 to disable. (default: 5). Hard block — tasks cannot enter WIP when at capacity.
timeHours.nonActionPeriodHelp: Hours of inactivity before the mood selector appears. Set to 0 to disable. (default: 3).

moduleManagement.title: Module Management
moduleManagement.help: Enable or disable modules to customize your workspace. Disabled modules are hidden from navigation and the umbrella menu.

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.help: Export, import, or clear all tasks and timer data from the application.
dataManagement.clearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete ALL application data? This action cannot be undone and will remove all tasks, settings, users, and boards.

celebration.label: Celebration
celebration.description: Fertilization Board for achievements and celebrations

dream.label: Dream
dream.description: Dream Board, Storyboard, and Prioritization views

salary.label: Salary System
salary.description: Transparent salary calculator sub-view within Plan

focus.label: Focus
focus.description: Focus mode for concentrated task work

voting.label: Voting
voting.description: Run polls and formal decisions with your audience

metrics.selectUserQol: Please select a user to view survey
metrics.selectUserFocus: Please select a user to view focus session stats
metrics.graphicsPlaceholder: Graphics content for {{tab}} will appear here
metrics.resetStatsDescription: This will permanently delete all your focus session history, including the heatmap and statistics. This action cannot be undone.

task.timeSheetDescription: View and edit time entries for task: {{title}}

kanban.archiveDialogDescription: Archive all tasks from the {{column}} column.
kanban.archiveOldOnly: Only archive cards older than {{n}} weeks

quickadd.noTasksDescription: Paste one task title per line.
quickadd.batchErrorDescription: Some tasks may not have been imported.
quickadd.diffErrorDescription: Some changes may not have been applied.
quickadd.batchDialogDescription: Paste one task title per line. Each non-empty line will be created as a separate task.
quickadd.batchPlaceholder:
Task title one
Task title two
Task title three

userManagement.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete user "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
userManagement.deleteFailed: Failed to delete user. Please try again.
userManagement.workloadInvalid: Workload must be a number between 0 and 100
userManagement.workloadUpdateFailed: Failed to update workload. Please try again.
userManagement.title: User Management
userManagement.help: Manage users stored in the application context. You can delete users that have no assigned tasks.

template.empty: No templates yet. Create one above to scaffold common workflows as a parent task with predefined children.

dataImport.successDescription: The page will reload to apply the imported data.
dataImport.unsupportedSchemaDescription: Schema version {{v}} is newer than the supported version {{max}}. Please update the application.
dataImport.networkError: Network error — could not reach the backend server.
dataImport.unknownError: Unknown error. See the browser console for details.

error.400: Bad request — the server rejected the data shape.
error.403: Forbidden — your account cannot perform this import.
error.404: Not found — an API endpoint is missing.
error.500: Server error while saving — check the server logs.

settings.title: Pomodoro Timer
settings.enableHelp: Activate the Pomodoro timer with work/break cycles.
settings.workDurationHelp: Length of each work period (1–60 min, default: 25 min)
settings.breakDurationHelp: Short break between work periods (1–15 min, default: 5 min)
settings.longBreakHelp: Break after completing a full cycle set (5–30 min, default: 15 min)
settings.cyclesHelp: Number of work periods before a long break (1–10, default: 4)

settings.title: Focus Mode
settings.autoStartBreakHelp: Automatically start break after work period ends.
settings.autoStartWorkHelp: Automatically start next work period after break ends.
settings.enablePiPHelp: Show an always-on-top timer window during Pomodoro sessions.
settings.autoOpenPiPHelp: Automatically open the PiP window when a Pomodoro session begins.
settings.pipSizeHelp: Size of the always-on-top timer window.
settings.showFocusOverlayHelp: Display a fullscreen timer overlay in the main window during Pomodoro sessions (instead of using PiP).
settings.wakeLockHelp: Keep the screen awake during Pomodoro sessions using Wake Lock API.
settings.soundNotificationsHelp: Play a chime when a Pomodoro phase transitions.

settings.title: Traveler Timer
settings.enableHelp: Work based on flight duration between two cities.

userSection.switchUuidHelp: Enter another UUID to adopt its workspace
userSection.recomputeHelp: Recompute the trigram, or edit it directly, then save
userSection.enterToSave: Press Enter to save or Esc to cancel
userSection.switchWarning: You have {{n}} task(s). Switching UUID will discard your current workspace in favor of the target UUID.

salary.loadError: Could not load the salary system.

config.expenseFactorHelp: e.g. 1.95 corresponds to 195% of annual gross salaries (covers employer-side social insurance, infrastructure, overhead, etc.).
config.expenseFactorNote: Generally, overhead represents 180%–220% of gross salary.
config.dialogDescription: Salary calculation variables. Adapt them to the client.

levelDescription.0: No expertise in the main function. Apprentice or radical career change.
levelDescription.1: Basic knowledge, beginner. Able to work under supervision.
levelDescription.2: Mastery of the main role, autonomous. Good ability to acquire team know-how.
levelDescription.3: Reference person (expert) in one or more domains. Source of information for colleagues.
levelDescription.4: Pioneer leading research, developing proof of concepts and bringing new knowledge.
levelDescription.5: Mastery of the entire architecture. Exceptional expertise recognized in the organization.
levelDescription.6: Creates new organization models and tools widely used by teams inside or outside the company. Recognized reference in the field.

levelDescription.0: Mobilizes more resources than results. In training, needs support.
levelDescription.2: Occasional impact on colleagues or other subsystems.
levelDescription.3: Team pillar, impact across the entire circle.
levelDescription.4: Impact extended to other areas of the organization. Transversal influencer.
levelDescription.5: Undeniable impact on the entire company in the short term.
levelDescription.6: Long-term impact and extended reach. Represents the organization externally.

dimensions.dialogDescription: Add, rename or reconfigure each dimension (expertise, impact, situation, responsibility, …).

employee.dialogDescription: Determinants determine the salary via the transparent formula.
employee.name: Name

table.name: Name
table.empty: No employee. Click "Employee" to add one.

legend.title: Legend
legend.base: Monthly base = reference hourly wage × hours per week × weeks per month
legend.determinants: + Determinants = sum of (level × value per level) for each dimension that affects salary
legend.gross100: Gross salary at 100% = (base + determinants) × (1 + seniority increase)^years × (1 + age increase)^age brackets reached
legend.grossAnnual100: Annual gross salary at 100% = gross salary at 100% × 12
legend.hourly: Hourly wage = gross salary at 100% ÷ (21 days × 8 hours × 5)
legend.monthlyWith13: Monthly salary with 13th = gross salary at 100% × workload
legend.monthly: Monthly salary = monthly salary with 13th ÷ 13 × 12 + monthly complements
legend.employerCost: Employer cost = annual gross salary × cost factor
legend.manualMode: • Manual amount: overhead is entered directly (rent, insurance, equipment, etc.). Charges = overhead + reserve.
legend.expenseFactorMode: • Cost factor: charges = (annual gross salary × factor) + reserve. The default factor can be overridden per scenario.

budget.title: Budget — available salary mass
budget.empty: No scenario. Click "Scenario" to add min/intermediate/max.
budget.expenseFactorNote: Generally, overhead represents 180%–220% of gross salary.

teamSimulator.title: Team simulator
teamSimulator.help: Modify the parameters below to simulate the impact on salary mass and budget. These changes are temporary and not saved.

hourlyRate.toastDescription: The hourly rate parameters have been saved.
hourlyRate.title: Hourly rate
hourlyRate.help: Simulates the billable hourly rate based on a typical profile (all determinants at maximum by default), with seniority and projected age brackets.

placeholders.refineNextRound: Modify the proposal text for the next round...

promote.description: This will create a new task in the Kanban board with the content of this card.

boardOptions.title: Board Options
boardOptions.importDescription: Import a board from a JSON file. This will replace the current board data.
boardOptions.warningTitle: Warning: This will destroy the current board
boardOptions.warningBody: Importing a board will completely replace the current {{type}} board — all cards, columns, votes, and settings will be lost. This action cannot be undone.
boardOptions.warningBackup: Consider exporting the current board first as a backup.
